item.title: Blog
item.description: Sharpen your defenses with the latest threat insights, industry trends and product updates sure to put you one step ahead of hackers – and your competition.

item.title: Blackpoint Cyber is Riding High in the Cloud in G2’s Fall 2024 Badges
item.description: G2's Fall 2024 badge recognition highlights our dedication to delivering exceptional cybersecurity solutions and the trust our customers place in our team.

item.title: Bringing Layered Defense to WatchGuard Partners
item.description: Blackpoint now integrates with WatchGuard EDR, bringing rapid response to WatchGuard’s endpoint detection for MSPs.

item.title: Be the Boss of Your Own Cloud Security Strategy
item.description: Take control of your cloud security strategy. Learn about the shared responsibility model and how to protect your business from evolving threats in the cloud.

item.title: Blackpoint’s Partner Program: Where Security and Scale Unite
item.description: Now Live, Blackpoint Global Partner Program to scale MSP businesses confidently with flexible security solutions, tailored support, and growth-driven resources

item.title: Blackpoint's POV on the CrowdStrike Update Incident: A Lesson in Endpoint Protection
item.description: Explore Blackpoint's take on the CrowdStrike incident and our unique approach to endpoint protection. Discover how we blend agility and stability in cybersecurity.

item.title: Managed Application Control is Stronger Than Ever – Adding 3 Additional Block Categories
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber’s Managed Application Control has expanded its recommended block list to enhance protection against attackers that abuse legitimate software.

item.title: Alert: New Critical Veeam CVEs Expose Backups to Ransomware Gangs
item.description: Update Veeam VBR to avoid ransomware gangs corrupting file backups, exfiltrating credentials, and unauthenticated remote code execution.

item.title: Alert: Active Exploit of Critical SonicWall CVE via SSLVPN for Initial Access
item.description: Both SonicWall and Blackpoint's Active SOC report active exploitation of SSLVPN for initial access by threat actors. Patch immediately!

item.title: Raspberry Robin, ScreenConnect, AteraAgent, RDP, whoami, & SharpShares
item.description: From compromised RDP sessions to failed installations of ScreenConnect and AteraAgent – threat actors keep abusing legitimate tools, processes, and commands.

item.title: Vanilla Tempest, Oyster Backdoor, NetSupport RAT, and Unknown Infostealers
item.description: Vanilla Tempest uses Oyster Backdoor & Gootloader with creative scheduled tasks, while unknown infostealers try to reach a Dutch VPS.

item.title: Asorult Stealer, AsyncRAT, and Trojan Malware: The Blackpoint Active SOC's Week in Review for August 30, 2024
item.description: Blackpoint's Active SOC team blocked multiple infostealer infections, from Asorult Stealer to AsyncRAT, for Technology & Industrial partners.

item.title: Greenshot, AnyDesk, TeamViewer, Classroom Spy Pro, ProcDump, & Mimikatz
item.description: Threat analysis rarely report on Greenshot and Classroom Spy Pro – until threat actors tried them against Blackpoint-protected environments.

item.title: AsyncRAT, Lumma Stealer, and Ransomhub Ransomware
item.description: An onboarding Legal Services client got a shock when our Active SOC uncovered an advanced, previously unknown Ransomhub infection!

item.title: MITRE ATT&CK T1091: Replication Through Removable Media
item.description: Review MITRE ATT&CK Initial Access tactic T1091 through a recent real-life incident with a Raspberry Robin-infected USB drive.
